title: Diasperus kanalophilus
taxonomy: Diasperus kanalophilus is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant is further classified as belonging to the genus Diasperus. More specifically, it is classified within the subfamily Faboideae. The classification of Diasperus kanalophilus also includes its order, which is Fabales, and its class, which is Magnoliopsida. Additionally, it is classified as a member of the kingdom Plantae.
